text:
Upstream fix: https://github.com/trusteddomainproject/OpenDKIM/commit/3deafe9a2b43a41ae740836b8c689e132424e1ac

It seems that version 2.11.0 will be released this year.

BTW: Upstream changed name from OpenDKIM Project to TrustedDomain Project and also moved from SourceForge to GitHub.
